title: Post-076 Validated Decomposition Artifact Publication Reconciliation Or Defer Decision
objective: Decide whether the validated Packet 075 test-surface decomposition artifact should proceed to bounded publication and host reconciliation or be deferred, without publishing or reconciling inside this decision packet.
decision_summary: Packet 076 validated the exact Packet 075 four-file test-surface decomposition artifact on the workstation with matching SHA-256 `aa258683ae8451a61322894b8c8995a2710c8a68f05a6cf5701c05401450b84a`, diff hygiene, typecheck, Next build, and focused Playwright passing. The truthful next step is a bounded publication and host reconciliation gate, not defer.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 078 - Packet 075 Validated Decomposition Artifact Publication And Host Reconciliation Gate
decision_effect: Publication-first is selected for the validated Packet 075 artifact.
Packet 077 does not itself publish, commit, push, or reconcile the host.
Packet 077 does not open simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution.
Packet 077 does not approve migration or any runtime/package/toolchain repair.
sql_permission_note: This decision packet authorizes no database writes and no publication, host reconciliation, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, second-worker execution, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 077 selects publication-first for the validated Packet 075 artifact and names Packet 078 as the bounded publication and host reconciliation gate. No publication or host reconciliation occurs in Packet 077.
